title: Kool Optimized
description: It's Improves Performance And Visuals With Adding Essential QoL Features
body:
![Kool Optimized](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31f2ca881b8f08980bcfc3b2603e73db0e31a978.png)

[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-F16436?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/kool-optimized)

---
## ✨ Features

- 🔎 Zoom 
- 🎨 Shaders Support
- 🎮 Controller Support
- 🔥 Dynamic Light
- 🎥 Flashback
- 🎤 Voice Chat
- 🏗️ Schematic
- 👜 Shulker Box Tooltip
- 🧩 Etc

---

## 🎯 Recommended For

- Vanilla players
- Creator

---

## ⚙️ Required System Memory

- **Recommended** 12 GB
- **Minimum** 6 GB

---

## ⚙️ Required Allocated Memory

- **Recommend** 4 GB
- **Minimum** 2 GB
---

## 📝 Notes

- Bug reports and suggestions are welcome
